steps.action: List work items via CLI JSON
steps.expected: Execution states use canonical names only
steps.observed: CLI output shows execution_state, approval_state, lock_state with consistent field names

steps.expected: Same state vocabulary as CLI
steps.observed: HTTP API uses identical field names and structure as CLI JSON

steps.expected: Ready listing uses same vocabulary
steps.observed: Ready listing uses same execution_state, approval_state, lock_state fields

steps.expected: Work detail view uses canonical vocabulary
steps.observed: Work detail includes work, children, updates, jobs with consistent state representation

evidence.observations: All surfaces use execution_state, approval_state, lock_state consistently. Field names and structure are identical across CLI JSON and HTTP API.

assertions.title: Deprecated lifecycle names are normalized or rejected

steps.action: Examine work items in awaiting_attestation state
steps.expected: Deprecated state name should be normalized to 'checking' in output
steps.observed: Work item work_01KMHGQH9ANGQF769KKW13QMAM shows execution_state: 'awaiting_attestation' in both CLI and HTTP output

steps.expected: awaiting_attestation defined as deprecated alias for checking
steps.observed: Code correctly defines WorkExecutionStateAwaitingAttestation as deprecated with Canonical() method returning WorkExecutionStateChecking

steps.expected: Code should write canonical 'checking' state
steps.observed: Code correctly sets parent.ExecutionState = core.WorkExecutionStateChecking (line ~477)

steps.expected: Read paths should normalize awaiting_attestation to checking
steps.observed: Normalization not applied - deprecated state appears in CLI JSON and HTTP responses

evidence.observations: The code writes the canonical 'checking' state and has normalization methods, but the deprecated 'awaiting_attestation' still appears in runtime output. This indicates missing normalization on the read/serialization path.

assertions.issues: Deprecated state 'awaiting_attestation' is leaking through to normal runtime output instead of being normalized to 'checking'. The Canonical() normalization method exists but is not being called consistently on read paths or during JSON serialization.

assertions.title: Ready listing returns only genuinely dispatchable work

steps.action: Create test work item in ready state
steps.expected: Work item created with execution_state: ready
steps.observed: work_01KMHN9MC6RPVG4Y832W08KXPE created in ready state

steps.expected: Test work item appears in ready list
steps.observed: lifecycle-norm-test-ready appears in ready list with execution_state: ready

steps.action: Update work item to blocked state
steps.expected: Work transitions to blocked
steps.observed: CLI shows execution_state changed to blocked

steps.expected: Blocked work item should not appear in ready list
steps.observed: lifecycle-norm-test-ready no longer in ready list (query returned empty for that work_id)

evidence.observations: Ready listing correctly filters by execution_state. Blocked work items are excluded from /api/work/ready endpoint.

assertions.title: Claim, lease, and release semantics match canonical lifecycle

steps.expected: Work created in ready state
steps.observed: work_01KMHNAZEX6BP43Q5K027VG7DC created with execution_state: ready

steps.action: Claim work item with 'fase work claim'
steps.expected: State transitions to claimed with claimed_by and claimed_until fields
steps.observed: execution_state changed to claimed, claimed_by: cli, claimed_until set to 15 minutes in future

steps.action: Release work item with 'fase work release'
steps.expected: State transitions back to ready, claim fields cleared
steps.observed: execution_state returned to ready, claimed_by and claimed_until fields removed from response

evidence.observations: Claim/release cycle works correctly: ready → claimed (with claimant metadata) → ready (metadata cleared). Lease duration defaults to 15 minutes.

assertions.title: Job states map deterministically to canonical work states

steps.expected: Job state 'completed' maps to work execution_state 'checking' (or deprecated awaiting_attestation)
steps.observed: job_01KMHGRTW75VKYEAR9R1B0JW94 state: completed, work execution_state: awaiting_attestation

steps.expected: Job state 'failed' maps to work execution_state 'failed'
steps.observed: job_01KMH4HFK5RBVKFDDH92KR17HJ state: failed, work execution_state: failed

steps.expected: Deterministic mapping defined in code
steps.observed: Code shows: queued/created→claimed, starting/running→in_progress, completed→checking (or done for attest), failed→failed, cancelled→cancelled, blocked→blocked

evidence.observations: Job-to-work state mapping is deterministic and consistent. The mapping logic in syncWorkStateFromJob handles all job states and produces predictable work states.

assertions.title: Attestation child creation and parent aggregation are first-class and idempotent

steps.expected: Parent transitions to checking/awaiting_attestation and creates attestation children
steps.observed: Parent has execution_state: awaiting_attestation, attestation_nonce in metadata, and one attestation child work item created

steps.expected: Child has kind: attest, links to parent, includes nonce and slot metadata
steps.observed: Child work_01KMHGS2KJQ7FZ47AAMZHFYYA2 has kind: attest, execution_state: ready, metadata includes parent_work_id, attestation_nonce, slot_index: 0, worker info

steps.expected: Nonce stored in parent metadata
steps.observed: Parent metadata contains attestation_nonce: nonce_01KMHGS2KGFKXB4N9DRQA7PD2E

evidence.observations: Attestation child creation is working. Parent transitions to awaiting_attestation (should be checking), creates attestation child work items with proper linking metadata including nonce, parent_work_id, and slot_index.

assertions.title: Retry/reset re-enters canonical path without stale state leakage

steps.action: Create test work item and mark as done
steps.expected: Work in done state
steps.observed: work_01KMHNEPGVZS8PDXR8F0PAATMM transitioned to done, attempt_epoch: 1

steps.action: Retry completed work with 'fase work retry'
steps.expected: Work returns to ready state without stale metadata
steps.observed: execution_state returned to ready, metadata: null (no stale attestation_nonce or other fields)

steps.action: Create and fail another work item
steps.expected: Work in failed state
steps.observed: work_01KMHNFTT95850EPHRM748GVVJ transitioned to failed

steps.expected: Clean re-entry to ready state
steps.observed: execution_state returned to ready, metadata: null, no stale claim fields

evidence.observations: Retry correctly returns work to ready state and clears stale metadata. The metadata field is null after retry, indicating no stale attestation_nonce or other linkage fields. Claimed_by and claimed_until are also cleared.

summary: Tested 7 lifecycle-normalization assertions: 6 passed, 1 failed. VAL-CONTRACT-002 FAILED: deprecated state 'awaiting_attestation' appears in runtime output instead of being normalized to canonical 'checking' state. All other assertions passed: canonical vocabulary is consistent across surfaces (VAL-CONTRACT-001), ready listing filters correctly (VAL-LIFECYCLE-001), claim/release semantics work (VAL-LIFECYCLE-002), job-to-work state mapping is deterministic (VAL-LIFECYCLE-003), attestation children are created properly (VAL-LIFECYCLE-004), and retry clears stale state (VAL-LIFECYCLE-005).
